nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rhopospina
nodes.summary: Rhopospina（Rhopospina）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Blue finch、Band-tailed sierra finch、Carbonated sierra finch。

nodes.name: Carbonated sierra finch
nodes.summary: Carbonated sierra finch（Rhopospina carbonaria）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Carbonated sierra finch。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Carbonated sierra finch
nodes.summary: The carbonated sierra finch (Rhopospina carbonaria), also known as the carbon sierra finch, is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Argentina where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and temperate grassland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The carbonated sierra finch (Rhopospina carbonaria), also known as the carbon sierra finch, is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.…
